graph_owner: nightly graphify agent owns graph.json (3888 nodes/5853 links @308e7b55); graphify NOT installed in sandbox + E-scope is YAML (poor AST fit) → E8 triples hand-extracted here as JSONL for the nightly merge, graph.json NOT mutated (matches E6/E7 convention; last code-append was D6).
kg_insight: Promotion/CI subgraph is sparse: at E7 the KG held ~2 ci_workflow nodes (wf_smoke_test) while origin/main now ships ~15 staging/deploy workflows + 2 staging compose files. The deploy layer's maturation (Gap-1/Gap-3 closure) is invisible to the code-AST KG, so schema<->CI drift cannot surface there. Hand-extracting the staging suite below.

label: docker-compose.staging.yml
note: EXISTS on origin/main — closes the long-standing Gap-1 (CLAUDE.md L45 + environment-quick-ref still mark it *(TODO)*/'does not exist yet'). Local/CHARLIE staging stack; STAGING_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, operator-id-gated.

label: docker-compose.staging-vps.yml
note: VPS staging stack, isolated from prod saas stack; deployed by deploy-staging.yml.

label: .github/workflows/deploy-staging.yml
note: Deploys docker-compose.staging-vps.yml to VPS. Triggers: workflow_dispatch + push to 'staging' branch. Prod stack never touched (docs/runbooks/staging-vps.md isolation).

label: .github/workflows/migration-verify.yml
note: Runs new migrations on STAGING per-PR (dev->staging->prod discipline). Verified migration 053 on #1981.

label: .github/workflows/qa-regression.yml
note: QA regression against the staging Telegram bot. MIRA_STAGING_BOT_USERNAME default @MiraStaging_bot — closes Gap-3 (staging bot wired; CLAUDE.md L47 still marks @MiraStagingBot *(TODO)* + naming mismatch).

label: .github/workflows/version-gate.yml
note: Required-safe PR check: FAILS a code PR whose /VERSION did not increase vs merge-base; docs/config-only PRs pass. NOT YET in main branch-protection required checks (human rollout step pending).

label: .github/workflows/version-tag.yml
note: On merge to main: auto-creates v<VERSION> tag + paired rollback/<date>-v<VERSION> checkpoint + GitHub Release, idempotently. Every merge now leaves a rollback point.

label: schema_migrations (ledger)
note: Canonical applied-migration ledger keyed on migration_name (FILENAME). Makes apply-migrations.yml idempotent + makes the 8 historical duplicate prefixes (incl. dup 048) SAFE without renumbering. Beta-readiness P3-2 (#5).

label: 053_cleanup_dogfood_test_account.sql
note: Deletes prod hub_users row created when a Playwright probe of the public signup flow hit prod (trailing-slash interceptor miss, #1977). FK-safe, idempotent. Orphaned hub_tenants row intentionally left (no prod psql).

evidence: origin/main:.github/workflows/deploy-vps.yml L3-5 (refuses unless Staging Gate succeeded on same commit)

note: Both staging compose files + the staging bot now exist on origin/main. Patch prepared. Not a beta blocker. Also: bot named @MiraStaging_bot in compose vs @MiraStagingBot in docs.

title: version-gate.yml exists but not yet a required branch-protection check
evidence: #1970 38cc1cfa rollout note: 'add Version Bump Check to main branch protection required checks once it has reported green'
note: Gate logic verified across 7 cases but enforcement is a pending HUMAN step. Until added, a code PR can merge without a /VERSION bump (no rollback tag).

title: Lens E GREEN held + strengthened
